About Me

Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams.

Work Experience

2020-03-01 to Present

Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure.

Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization

Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests

Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans

2017-06-01 to 2020-02-28

Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production.

Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users

Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes
